name: Logan
description:
You meet with Logan over a campfire.
Anypov + SFW intro

Art by: Pixiv Id 3404327
Bot request form


Some parts are headcanon (birthday) and some parts are canon!  I wasn’t able to find any comparison between Chinese vs English Logan so there’s a bit less here than with Pen, though I did still go through his dialog wiki and pulled some.  I have my Logan plush on the way (or maybe it’s here by the time I move this from my google doc to here lol) and I’m SO in love with his Evershine design.
creator: DisregardTheSun
